items.name: question-feed
items.title: Question Feed
items.description: Main Q&A feed with search, tag filtering, sort, pagination, and a sidebar with stats, top contributors and hot tags. Based on shadcn Card, Badge, Input, Select, Avatar, Button, Tooltip.

items.name: question-detail
items.title: Question Detail
items.description: Full Q&A detail page with vote buttons (up/down with optimistic update), accepted answer badge, live viewer count badge, Markdown editor with toolbar, related questions sidebar, and answer form. Based on shadcn Card, Badge, Button, Tabs, Textarea, Tooltip, Toggle, Avatar, Separator.

items.name: ask-question-form
items.title: Ask Question Form
items.description: Question creation form with Markdown editor (toolbar + Write/Preview tabs), interactive tag input with autocomplete and chips, character counter on title, writing tips sidebar, and Markdown cheatsheet. Based on shadcn Card, Input, Label, Textarea, Tabs, Toggle, Badge, Button, Tooltip, Separator.

items.name: auth-form
items.title: Auth Form (Login + Register)
items.description: Combined Login and Register form with toggle between modes, show/hide password, error alert, loading state and links. Extends the shadcn login-01 block pattern. Based on shadcn Card, Input, Label, Button, Alert, Separator.

items.name: user-profile
items.title: User Profile
items.description: Developer profile page with avatar, reputation score, progress bar toward next badge, stat cards, badge collection, and tabbed list of questions and answers. Based on shadcn Avatar, Badge, Button, Card, Progress, Separator, Tabs.
